name: boss
description: China job search — search jobs, job details, company profiles, salary statistics, reference data (cities, industries, filters) via spec-based page extraction and node API

dependencies.searchJobs \u2192 getJobDetail: searchJobs returns jobLink used by getJobDetail
dependencies.getJobDetail \u2192 getCompanyProfile: getJobDetail returns company.link used by getCompanyProfile
dependencies.searchJobs \u2192 getSalary: getSalary uses same query+city as searchJobs
dependencies.getCities \u2192 searchJobs: getCities returns city codes used by searchJobs
